---
title: "BST413 - Bayesian Inference"
description: "University of Rochester, Spring 2026"
site: distill::distill_website
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

# Learn more about creating websites with Distill at:
# https://rstudio.github.io/distill/website.html

# Learn more about publishing to GitHub Pages at:
# https://rstudio.github.io/distill/publish_website.html#github-pages

```

# Administrivia

TH 11:00-12:40, SRB 1402
<br>
**Instructor**: Tanzy Love
<br>
**Website**: https://bst-urmc.github.io/bst413-spring2026-site/
<br>
[**Syllabus**](static/syllabus413-2026.pdf)

# Content

0. [Introduction](lecture/l00-intro.html)
* Resources:
    1. [install GIT](https://happygitwithr.com/install-git.html)
    2. [install *base* R](https://cran.r-project.org/)
    3. [install RStudio](https://www.rstudio.com/products/rstudio/download/#download)
* Example: Example Lab 0 from BST 430: [instructions](hw_lab_instruction/lab00-demonstration/lab00-hello-class.html) and repo [invite](https://classroom.github.com/a/LzRrMHr2).
* HW 3 assigned.  [instructions](hw_lab_instruction/hw-3/hw3-spring2026.html) and repo (accept GH classroom [invite](https://classroom.github.com/a/nYoS9qml)).  Due 5pm EDT, April 14.
<!--     * HW 3 [solutions](hw_lab_instruction/hw-3/hw3.html) -->
* HW 4 assigned.  [instructions](hw_lab_instruction/hw-4/hw4-spring2026.html) 
and repo (accept GH classroom [invite](https://classroom.github.com/a/8XnJvKuL)).  Due 5pm EDT, April 28.
<!--     * HW 4 [solutions](hw_lab_instruction/hw-4/hw4.html) -->
